title: bytedance/UI-TARS-desktop
summary: UI-TARS-desktop offers an open-source multimodal agent stack, aiming to unify model capabilities with agent infrastructure.
content:
UI-TARS-desktop offers an open-source multimodal agent stack, aiming to unify model capabilities with agent infrastructure.
Highlights:
- 3529 stars this week
- Multimodal agent stack
- Open-source by ByteDance
- Focus on infrastructure integration
